message:
feat: add supervisor to all dashboard controls + granular pin API

- Added supervisor to switch, model, pause, resume, pin, unpin endpoints
- Switch/model now write governor model file + kick instead of old hive CLI
- New granular pin endpoints: /api/pin/:agent/cli, /api/pin/:agent/model
- Unpin supports same granular dimensions
- Status API now returns pinnedBoth, pinnedCli, pinnedModel per agent

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
